base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of goriya_walk_throw — a character (playable) from 1986 legend of zelda. Goriya — Mog-like creature throwing boomerang. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Goriya — Mog-like creature throwing boomerang; 2-frame walk + 1 throw pose per direction; returning boomerang damages Link
